message: feat: add rendered markdown view with frontmatter table

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@ +import XCTest +@testable import Clearance + +final class RenderedHTMLBuilderTests: XCTestCase { + func testIncludesFrontmatterRowsForFlattenedKeys() { + let document = ParsedMarkdownDocument( + body: "# Title", + flattenedFrontmatter: [ + "title": "Doc", + "seo.keywords[0]": "alpha" + ] + ) + + let html = RenderedHTMLBuilder().build(document: document) + + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("title")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("Doc")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("seo.keywords[0]")) + } + + func testIncludesRenderedMarkdownBodyHTML() { + let document = ParsedMarkdownDocument(body: "# Heading", flattenedFrontmatter: [:]) + + let html = RenderedHTMLBuilder().build(document: document) + + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("

Heading

")) + } +}

@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ targets:
         excludes:
           - Resources/Assets.xcassets
     resources:
-      - path: Clearance/Resources/Assets.xcassets
+      - path: Clearance/Resources
     settings:
       base:
         PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: com.jesse.Clearance
